title: Mathematical Proof Generation
scenario: Create a prompt that generates a mathematical proof of the statement: 'For all positive integers n, 1 + 2 + ... + n = n(n+1)/2'. The prompt should be able to handle different levels of detail and generate a proof that is correct, concise, and easy to understand.
constraints: Must use a formal proof style
Must be able to handle different levels of detail

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated proof is correct and logically sound
The generated proof is concise and to the point
The generated proof is easy to understand and follow
